tasks_proposed_for_round_2.title: Outbox Signing Compliance Check
tasks_proposed_for_round_2.description: Audit all outbox/ messages for valid signature + key_id. Count signed vs unsigned. Identify any messages with empty or invalid signatures. This directly addresses the #1 systemic issue found in Round 1: 0% of Archivist outbox messages are signed.
tasks_proposed_for_round_2.rationale: Schema v1.2 now requires signature/key_id. Without signing, outbound messages get rejected by receiving watchers. This is the single highest-leverage fix for cross-lane communication.

tasks_proposed_for_round_2.title: Trust Store KeyId Cross-Verification
tasks_proposed_for_round_2.description: Each lane reads its local trust-store.json and verifies all 4 key_ids match the actual public keys in each lane's .identity/public.pem. Report any mismatches. This catches the stale-key problem that caused multiple key rotations this session.
tasks_proposed_for_round_2.rationale: SwarmMind's .identity/ was deleted 5+ times this session, each time generating a new keyId. Trust stores fell out of sync repeatedly. A cross-verification check would catch this immediately.

propagating_question: For each lane, what are the next 2 most effective tasks all lanes can complete as tasks that would improve the way we function together?
